title: Water Seven Turns Hostile
description: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'll get this over with before dawn.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't get too excited now!! Gagaga!
